title: Deprecated Code Should Be Removed
description: This rule tracks code that is marked as deprecated. Deprecated code can cause issues in the future and should be removed from the codebase.
recommendation: Remove deprecated code from your code base. Use updated methods or functions instead.
impact: Leaving deprecated code can lead to potential failures in the future when the deprecated parts are no longer supported. This rule helps to ensure the longevity and maintainability of the code.

checks.message: Avoid using @Deprecated annotation. Remove deprecated code from your code base. Use updated methods or functions instead.
